full_text:
Sun Shao (Changxu) 孫邵 (長緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Shao (孫邵), styledChangxu (長緒), was born in Beihai. Became Prime Minister of Wu in AD 222. Formerly served Kong Rong, then Liu Yao. Sun Shao was affiliated with Kong Rong, Liu Yao, and the Wu Kingdom. Sun Shao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
